substep.title: Extract Address-Marked Items
substep.action: Read {{bundle_dir}}/pr-cycle-assessment-iter-{{iteration_count}}.json. Filter to items where recommendation == "Address". If empty, skip to step 7.

invoke-agent.name: codesmith-worker
invoke-agent.prompt:
Implement PR review fixes for PR #{{pr_number}}.
Inputs: - Worktree: {{worktree_path}} - Branch: {{branch}} - Approved items: {{bundle_dir}}/pr-cycle-assessment-iter-{{iteration_count}}.json (filter to recommendation == 'Address')
For each Address item: 1. Read the file:line in context. 2. Apply the minimal change specified in the assessment. 3. Run project tests + build for the touched file(s). 4. If a change breaks tests, stop and surface — do NOT commit half-broken state.
When all Address items are done: 1. Stage all changes: git add -A 2. Commit: 'Address PR #{{pr_number}} review feedback' with one bullet per item in the commit body. 3. Push to {{branch}}. 4. Return the commit SHA.

substep.title: Capture Fix Commit SHA
substep.action: Store the returned commit SHA as {{fix_commit_sha}}. Persist to {{bundle_dir}}/pr-cycle-changes-iter-{{iteration_count}}.md with the commit + summary of items addressed.
